description: In honor of America's beloved National Bloody Mary Day, our Deep Chip Away Bloody Mary delivers the rich, complex flavors of this classic cocktail in a crispy chip form.
Today's Chip of the Day is inspired by Colombia cuisine: Arepas. Born on this day, 1980 - Dian Rueda, a Colombian actress and model known for her roles in telenovelas.

Seaweed Tempura chips bring Hakozaki Shrine's Tamaseseri Festival spirit to your plate today. Crispy and airy tempura texture meets the sea's fresh flavors, celebrating Japanese culinary tradition in every bite.

Event: "The eleventh of the Twelve Days of Christmas (Western Christianity)" | Chip: "Cranberry"

 "As we celebrate the eleventh day of the festive Twelve Days of Christmas, let these Cranberry chips bring to your table the sweet and tangy essence of holiday cheer.
event_name: The eleventh of the Twelve Days of Christmas. (Western Christianity)

description: Today, we honor National Whipped Cream Day by indulging in our 'Cream Cheese' chip.

Brace yourselves for today, April Fool's Day! Celebrate the spirit of mischief and pranks with these Wasabi Nori. The zesty wasabi offers a tongue-tingling kick reminiscent of Aprils playful surprises.
Flatbread today honors Remembrance Day of the Dead in Armenia.
Lemon Basil Chip celebrates today's Children's Day spirit from Thailand. A vibrant mix of citrus freshness and aromatic basil, perfect for this joyful celebration.
event_name: Earliest day on which Children's Day can fall, while January 14 is the latest; celebrated on the second Saturday in January. (Thailand)

description: Unleashing the rich heritage of Spanish cuisine during National Hispanic Heritage Month, our Rubio Spanish Chorizo adds a bold flavor journey to every bite.
In honor of Mexico's spirited celebration of independence on September 16th, our Lundberg Family Farms Organic Grounded Ancho Chile chips serve as a tribute to the rich cultural heritage.
Today, we honor Eugenio Mara de Hostos by savoring Chorizo Chipotle chipsspicy and smoky flavors that encapsulate his legacy of cultural integration.
event_name: Eugenio María de Hostos Day (Puerto Rico)

description:
Connection to Flavor:
"Santitas Cilantro Lime embodies the vibrant culinary heritage that has thrived in Mexico and throughout South America for centuries.
Marking the foundation of modern-day Korea on this special day, we celebrate the vibrant flavors that define its culinary culture.
Tomato Basil - Today's flavor takes us on an Italian journey to celebrate Ratification Day.
event_name: 1784 – American Revolutionary War: Ratification Day, United States: Congress ratifies the Treaty of Paris with Great Britain.

description: Connecting the flavor of Salt Vinegar chips to the joyous celebration of The Chinese New Year  this auspicious holiday marks the beginning of a prosperous year ahead.
Embrace the vibrant spirit of St. Patricks Day, celebrating Irelands rich culture and heritage.
Celebrate France's annual online shopping festival with these flavorful French Onion Whole Grain chips. Savor the rich, caramelized taste of classic French onion soup in every bite.
On this vibrant and colorful Day of the Dead, honor those who have passed while savoring the bold flavors of traditional Mexican street food.

Lime Rolled today celebrates the spirit of Southern pride. These zesty chips evoke the essence of Confederate Heroes Day and Robert E. Lee Day, offering a tangy burst that honors tradition and heritage.
event_name: Confederate Heroes Day (Texas), and its related observance: Robert E. Lee Day (Alabama, Arkansas, Florida, Georgia and Mississippi)

description: Pay homage to this vibrant Mexican holiday celebrating ancestors on Dia de los Muertos. These tortillas bring the bold flavors of elotes, street corn seasoned with cotija cheese and smoky adobo to every bite.
Honoring one of America's heartwarming culinary traditions, National Chili Day. These Sweet Spicy Jalapeno chips bring the robust flavors of Southern comfort food to your dining table.

Today, Ukraine celebrates unity; unite your taste buds with Olive Hamburger Dill chips. Their savory flavor is a delightful reminder of today's celebration, bringing the essence of dill and olive to every bite.
Steak, today's Chip of the Day, embodies the spirit of freedom as we celebrate World Freedom Day in Taiwan and South Korea.
event_name: World Freedom Day (Taiwan and South Korea)

description: Mango Salsa Chip celebrates Uttar Pradesh Day with a vibrant blend of fresh mangoes and tangy spices. Embracing today's celebration, this chip offers a delightful taste journey through India's diverse culinary culture.
Today, we honor Betico Day from Aruba. Indulge in the bold flavors of Cheddar Black Pepper chips, a perfect blend that captures the essence of this vibrant celebration.

Mesquite Bbq chips celebrate today's Australia Day spirit, merging smoky flavors with Aussie pride. These barbecue-flavored snacks capture the essence of a classic Australian feast, perfect for today's celebration.
An era of enlightenment and creativity that started in the 14th century.
Today, in January, marks the beginning of tropical flavors. Embrace the warmth with our Fruit Toasted Coconut chips, capturing the essence of sunny days and island breezes.

Marking National Fried Chicken Day is an opportunity to celebrate this culinary delight. Experience the fusion of sweet and savory with these Korean BBQ , reminiscent of a vibrant Korean barbecue feast.
Honoring the essence of Japanese tradition, the Teriyaki chips whisk you away to the heart of their culinary arts. Celebrate the harmony of flavors with this delightful fusion in every bite.

Today marks the independence of Nauru from Australia in 1968. Join in the celebration with our Vinegar Cheddar chips - their tangy flavor mirrors the spirit of freedom and zest that marks this day of pride.
event_name: Independence Day (Nauru), celebrates independence from Australia in 1968.
